sme_leads.notes: No dedicated website — only a third-party Booksy booking link — invisible to Google organic search; a clean local site with embedded booking and postcode SEO would immediately increase walk-in conversion.
Operates purely from a Facebook page with no dedicated website; a one-page site with a booking widget and local SEO would outrank competitor barbers in Totton search results.

Family-run cafe trading since 1989 with no owned website — only directory listings and Facebook; a simple menu and contact site optimised for 'cafe Woolston Southampton' would drive new daytime footfall.

High-street beauty salon with no owned website, relying entirely on Yell, Fresha and Facebook; a branded site with a treatment menu and inline booking would improve trust and cut third-party platform fees.

Growing aesthetics brand with an active Facebook following and Treatwell profile but no owned website; a professional site with a treatment gallery and before/after photos would lift premium bookings and brand credibility.

dts.title: DVSA wait times in your area right now
dts.hook: Show a phone-screen recording of the DVSA booking portal revealing 4-month waits, then cut to DrivingTestSwap.uk confirming a date 3 weeks away — ends with 'Swap yours in 60 seconds' CTA.
dts.notes: Highly searchable topic; captures learners already frustrated with wait times and drives direct traffic to DTS.

dts.title: POV: You just got your test date 6 weeks earlier
dts.hook: First-person walkthrough showing someone logging into DTS, seeing an available slot, confirming the swap, and getting the confirmation email — authentic and relatable for the learner-driver audience.
dts.notes: Emotional payoff ('I don't have to wait any more') drives shares among learners and their parents; low production cost to film.

athletics.title: 60-Day Sprint Progression — Week-by-Week
athletics.hook: Weekly clips filmed at the track showing measurable changes in start position, drive phase, and top-end speed; voice-over coaching cues position Dowayne as both elite athlete and credible coach.
athletics.notes: Serialised content builds a returning audience; strong foundation for a future sprint coaching offer or programme.

athletics.title: The calisthenics move most gym-goers can't do — and how to build up to it
athletics.hook: Break down a high-difficulty move (front lever, human flag, or muscle-up) with progressive drills filmed in the gym; clear steps with Dowayne demonstrating each stage.
athletics.notes: High save and share rate on Instagram; positions Dowayne as an authority in functional strength and bodyweight training.

aimybiz.title: Watch a rep go from 30% to 60% close rate in 30 days with AI coaching
aimybiz.hook: Carousel or 60-second video documenting a composite rep's journey — before/after call transcript snippets, objection scores, and manager dashboard — speaks directly to sales managers frustrated by inconsistent team performance.
aimybiz.notes: Use anonymised or fictional data for now; end with a CloseCoach demo CTA or waitlist link.

aimybiz.title: The 3 objections killing deals across your whole team (and how AI catches them in real time)
aimybiz.hook: Bold opening line naming the 3 most common unhandled objections in SME sales; explains how CloseCoach flags them during live calls and gives instant coaching feedback, ending with a demo offer.
aimybiz.notes: Resonates with heads of sales and sales directors; pin to profile and re-share weekly to maximise organic reach.
